gui.crptapwater.corpse_dialog.title: Corpse Brother Dialog
gui.crptapwater.corpse_dialog.hint: [ Press ESC to close · Right-click a Corpse Brother ]
dialog.crptapwater.question.root: Urrghh... Gurgle... What... What do you want from me?
dialog.crptapwater.question.about_drink: Drinks? ... Gurgle... You mean the stuff from the Water Company?
dialog.crptapwater.question.about_body: Me? ... Cough cough... I'm... okay I guess... Urgh... Got used to it...
dialog.crptapwater.question.about_work: Work? ... Ugh... I help out at the Water Company... Gurgle...
dialog.crptapwater.question.about_gift: Giving me... something? Gurgle... What is it...?
dialog.crptapwater.answer.root.drink: Let's talk about Corpse Water drinks
dialog.crptapwater.answer.root.work: What's your job at the Water Company?
dialog.crptapwater.answer.about_drink.ta: What does the drink actually taste like?
dialog.crptapwater.answer.about_drink.re: What's really in the Corpse Water recipe?
dialog.crptapwater.answer.about_drink.su: What flavor do you think would suit Corpse Brothers?
dialog.crptapwater.answer.about_body.com: Don't be too sad, things will get better slowly
dialog.crptapwater.answer.about_body.hea: Have you ever thought about being cured back to normal?
dialog.crptapwater.answer.about_work.wha: Tell me the details of what you do at work
dialog.crptapwater.answer.about_work.pri: How much does a bottle of the water actually cost?
dialog.crptapwater.answer.about_gift.gol: Offer a Golden Apple (rumored to do something)
dialog.crptapwater.answer.about_gift.lat: Maybe I'll bring something next time
dialog.crptapwater.result.drink_taste: Gurgle... It's kind of sticky... a bit bitter... But... quenches the thirst real good... Feels solid inside... A familiar flavor...
dialog.crptapwater.result.drink_recipe: Urgh... The recipe? Gurgle... that's a company trade secret... I really can't just tell you... Urgh...
dialog.crptapwater.result.drink_suggest: Urgh... I wish they made a "thicker, richer" kind... with more "authentic" texture... The current Corpse Water is too watered down... Not enough punch...
dialog.crptapwater.result.body_comfort: ...Sniff... Cough... Thank you... You're a kind soul... Urgh... No one has said anything like that to me in ages...
dialog.crptapwater.result.body_heal: Cured? ... Urgh... I... I wouldn't even dare to hope... Golden Apples are so precious... Who would ever waste one on a Corpse Brother like me...
dialog.crptapwater.result.work_what: I... I mostly stand guard over the village water troughs... and give water to passing villagers... Gurgle... Not busy, but boring... You should try it sometime...
dialog.crptapwater.result.work_price: Urgh... A plain Corpse Water bottle is 3 Emeralds... Longshi Mineral Water is 5... Gurgle... I can't even afford Longshi myself...
dialog.crptapwater.result.gift_later: Ah... Is that so... Gurgle... No worries... Just come back when you have something... I'll be right here...
dialog.crptapwater.result.accept_golden_: !!! Is... Is that really a legendary Golden Apple?! Gurgle... Thank you... Thank you so much... C-Can I really have this?!
dialog.crptapwater.result.no_golden_appl: Hmm? ... That's not a Golden Apple in your hand... Urgh... It's fine... The thought alone means a lot...
dialog.crptapwater.result.accept_flesh: Gurgle... Rotten flesh... Yes! ... A bit gamey, but it's real food... Thanks! I'll savor every bite!
dialog.crptapwater.result.no_flesh: Rotten flesh? ... That's not it in your hand... Urgh... No big deal... Just remember to bring some next time...
